kpiDefinitions.targets: Planned citation-ready surfaces and answer assets.
kpiDefinitions.opportunities: Detected queries/surfaces where ApprovalPrep may be cited.
kpiDefinitions.observedWins: Only telemetry-backed or manually verified surfacing/citation events.
kpiDefinitions.generatedSurfaces: Actual generated pages, answer assets, atoms, or index records that exist in the repo.

monthlyPlan.focus: Letter Studio foundation and highest-intent answers
Credit self-service trust and boundary coverage
Auto, business, mortgage, and life-admin surfaces

selectionRules: Prefer high user utility even when search difficulty is high.
Separate indexable growth pages from utility/noindex/product-flow content.
Never claim observed citation wins without telemetry/manual proof.
